$comment: Parameter titles and descriptions extracted from Okapi help HTML documentation. Produced by Claude Code one-shot extraction from /Users/asgeirf/src/okapi/Okapi/help/

extractStandalone.title: Extract standalone strings
extractStandalone.description: Extract string values that are not directly associated with a key name.

extractAllPairs.title: Extract all key/string pairs
extractAllPairs.description: Extract all strings that have a key associated. If an exception regular expression is defined, strings with keys matching it are excluded.

exceptions.title: Key exception pattern
exceptions.description: Regular expression matching keys that should have the inverse extraction behavior.

useCodeFinder.title: Use inline code finder
useCodeFinder.description: Enable detection of inline codes within extracted text using the defined regular expression rules.

codeFinderRules.title: Inline code rules
codeFinderRules.description: Regular expression rules defining patterns in extracted text that should be treated as inline codes.

useCodeFinder.title: Use inline code finder
useCodeFinder.description: Enable detection of inline codes within extracted text using the defined regular expression rules.

codeFinderRules.title: Inline code rules
codeFinderRules.description: Regular expression rules defining patterns in extracted text that should be treated as inline codes.

outputPath.title: Report file path
outputPath.description: Full path of the HTML report file to generate. You can use the variable ${rootDir} in the path.

outputType.title: Report output type
outputType.description: Format of the quality check report output.

autoOpen.title: Open report after completion
autoOpen.description: Automatically open the report file after the quality check process is complete.

includeTextContainers.title: Include text containers
includeTextContainers.description: Include text container elements in the quality check verification.

useGenericCodes.title: Use generic codes
useGenericCodes.description: Use generic inline code representation when comparing codes between source and target.

leadingWS.title: Check leading whitespace
leadingWS.description: Flag text units where the leading whitespace characters differ between source and target.

trailingWS.title: Check trailing whitespace
trailingWS.description: Flag text units where the trailing whitespace characters differ between source and target.

emptyTarget.title: Warn on empty target
emptyTarget.description: Flag segments where the target translation is empty while the source is not.

emptySource.title: Warn on non-empty target with empty source
emptySource.description: Flag segments where the target is not empty while its source is empty.

targetSameAsSource.title: Warn if target is same as source
targetSameAsSource.description: Flag segments where the target translation is identical to the source text. Inline codes are excluded from comparison.

targetSameAsSourceForSameLanguage.title: Warn if target equals source for same language
targetSameAsSourceForSameLanguage.description: Flag segments where the target is the same as the source when source and target languages are identical.

targetSameAsSourceWithCodes.title: Include codes in same-as-source comparison
targetSameAsSourceWithCodes.description: Include inline codes when comparing source and target for the target-same-as-source check.

targetSameAsSourceWithNumbers.title: Include numbers in same-as-source comparison
targetSameAsSourceWithNumbers.description: Include numeric values when comparing source and target for the target-same-as-source check.

codeDifference.title: Warn on code differences
codeDifference.description: Verify that the target content has the same inline codes as the source. Reports missing and extra codes.

guessOpenClose.title: Guess open/close code pairing
guessOpenClose.description: Attempt to guess which inline codes are opening and closing pairs when comparing source and target.

strictCodeOrder.title: Strict code order
strictCodeOrder.description: Require inline codes to appear in the same order in target as in source.

checkXliffSchema.title: Check XLIFF schema
checkXliffSchema.description: Validate the input document against an XLIFF schema.

xliffSchemaType.title: XLIFF schema type
xliffSchemaType.description: The XLIFF schema version to validate against.

checkPatterns.title: Check source/target patterns
checkPatterns.description: Verify that each source pattern has its corresponding expected part in the target.

checkWithLT.title: Use LanguageTool
checkWithLT.description: Run verifications provided by a LanguageTool server. May increase processing time significantly.

serverURL.title: LanguageTool server URL
serverURL.description: URL of the LanguageTool server for grammar and style checking.

ltBilingualMode.title: LanguageTool bilingual mode
ltBilingualMode.description: Auto-translate error messages from LanguageTool into a different language.

saveSession.title: Save session
saveSession.description: Save the quality check session for later review.

sessionPath.title: Session file path
sessionPath.description: Full path for saving the quality check session file.

doubledWord.title: Warn on doubled words
doubledWord.description: Flag target segments with sequential repetition of the same word. Case-insensitive.

doubledWordExceptions.title: Doubled word exceptions
doubledWordExceptions.description: Semicolon-separated list of words allowed to be repeated sequentially.

corruptedCharacters.title: Warn on corrupted characters
corruptedCharacters.description: Check for patterns indicating corrupted characters, such as UTF-8 opened as ISO-8859-1.

scope.title: Verification scope
scope.description: Which entries to process: all, only approved, or only non-approved.

checkMaxCharLength.title: Check maximum character length
checkMaxCharLength.description: Flag target text longer than a given percentage of source text character length.

maxCharLengthBreak.title: Max length: long text threshold
maxCharLengthBreak.description: Character count above which text is considered 'long' for max length checking.

maxCharLengthAbove.title: Max length: percentage for long text
maxCharLengthAbove.description: Maximum allowed percentage of source length for long text.

maxCharLengthBelow.title: Max length: percentage for short text
maxCharLengthBelow.description: Maximum allowed percentage of source length for short text.

checkMinCharLength.title: Check minimum character length
checkMinCharLength.description: Flag target text shorter than a given percentage of source text character length.

minCharLengthBreak.title: Min length: long text threshold
minCharLengthBreak.description: Character count above which text is considered 'long' for min length checking.

minCharLengthAbove.title: Min length: percentage for long text
minCharLengthAbove.description: Minimum allowed percentage of source length for long text.

minCharLengthBelow.title: Min length: percentage for short text
minCharLengthBelow.description: Minimum allowed percentage of source length for short text.

checkStorageSize.title: Check storage size
checkStorageSize.description: Verify the byte storage size of the target text against defined limits.

checkAbsoluteMaxCharLength.title: Check absolute maximum character length
checkAbsoluteMaxCharLength.description: Flag target text exceeding an absolute maximum character count.

absoluteMaxCharLength.title: Absolute maximum character length
absoluteMaxCharLength.description: The absolute maximum number of characters allowed in the target text.

checkAllowedCharacters.title: Check allowed characters
checkAllowedCharacters.description: Check target characters against a character set encoding and/or allowed characters list.

checkCharacters.title: Check character set
checkCharacters.description: Warn if a character is not included in the specified character set encoding.

charset.title: Character set encoding
charset.description: Character set encoding name (e.g., ISO-8859-1) to check target text against.

extraCharsAllowed.title: Extra allowed characters
extraCharsAllowed.description: Regular expression matching characters to allow even if not in the specified encoding.

checkTerms.title: Check terminology
checkTerms.description: Verify that glossary terminology is used correctly in the translation.

stringMode.title: String matching mode
stringMode.description: How terminology strings should be matched in source and target text.

betweenCodes.title: Match between codes
betweenCodes.description: Restrict terminology matching to text between inline codes only.

showFullPath.title: Show full file path
showFullPath.description: Show the full file path in the report instead of just the filename.

checkBlacklist.title: Check blacklisted terms
checkBlacklist.description: Check target text against a list of forbidden terms.

allowBlacklistSub.title: Allow blacklist substring matches
allowBlacklistSub.description: Allow blacklisted terms to match as substrings within words.

blacklistSrc.title: Check blacklist in source
blacklistSrc.description: Also check the source text for blacklisted terms.

blacklistPath.title: Blacklist file path
blacklistPath.description: Path to the file containing forbidden terms.

showOnlyPatternDescription.title: Show only pattern description
showOnlyPatternDescription.description: Show only the description of matched patterns in the report, not the pattern itself.

patternCount.title: Number of patterns
patternCount.description: Number of source/target pattern pairs to check.

extraCodesAllowed.title: Extra codes allowed
extraCodesAllowed.description: Number of extra inline codes allowed in target beyond what is in source.

missingCodesAllowed.title: Missing codes allowed
missingCodesAllowed.description: Number of source inline codes allowed to be missing from the target.

typesToIgnore.title: Code types to ignore
typesToIgnore.description: Semicolon-separated list of inline code types to exclude from code checking.

regEx.title: Use regular expressions
regEx.description: Enable regular expression mode for search patterns.

dotAll.title: Dot also matches line-feed
dotAll.description: Change the meaning of '.' so that it matches every character including \n.

multiLine.title: Multiline mode
multiLine.description: Change the meaning of ^ and $ so they match at the beginning and end of any line.

target.title: Process target
target.description: Apply search and replace to the target text.

source.title: Process source
source.description: Apply search and replace to the source text.

replaceALL.title: Replace all occurrences
replaceALL.description: Replace all occurrences of the search pattern, not just the first match.

replacementsPath.title: Replacements file path
replacementsPath.description: Path to a file containing saved search and replace rules.

logPath.title: Log file path
logPath.description: Path to the file where operations are logged.

saveLog.title: Save log
saveLog.description: Save a log of all operations performed.

segmentSource.title: Segment source text
segmentSource.description: Segment the source text using SRX segmentation rules.

segmentTarget.title: Segment target text
segmentTarget.description: Segment existing target text using SRX segmentation rules.

renumberCodes.title: Renumber codes
renumberCodes.description: Renumber inline codes after segmentation to maintain sequential numbering.

checkSegments.title: Verify segment alignment
checkSegments.description: Verify that each source segment has a corresponding target segment.

trimSrcLeadingWS.title: Trim source leading whitespace
trimSrcLeadingWS.description: Remove leading whitespace from source segments.

trimSrcTrailingWS.title: Trim source trailing whitespace
trimSrcTrailingWS.description: Remove trailing whitespace from source segments.

trimTrgLeadingWS.title: Trim target leading whitespace
trimTrgLeadingWS.description: Remove leading whitespace from target segments.

trimTrgTrailingWS.title: Trim target trailing whitespace
trimTrgTrailingWS.description: Remove trailing whitespace from target segments.

forceSegmentedOutput.title: Force segmented output
forceSegmentedOutput.description: Force output to always be in segmented form.

deepenSegmentation.title: Deepen segmentation
deepenSegmentation.description: Apply additional segmentation within existing segments.

treatIsolatedCodesAsWhitespace.title: Treat isolated codes as whitespace
treatIsolatedCodesAsWhitespace.description: Treat isolated inline codes as whitespace during segmentation.

doNotSegmentIfHasTarget.title: Skip segmentation if target exists
doNotSegmentIfHasTarget.description: Do not segment a text unit if it already has a target translation.

leverage.title: Enable leveraging
leverage.description: Enable looking up existing translations from a translation resource.

resourceClassName.title: Translation resource
resourceClassName.description: The translation resource connector class for leveraging.

noQueryThreshold.title: No-query threshold
noQueryThreshold.description: Minimum score threshold below which the resource is not queried.

threshold.title: Minimum match score
threshold.description: Minimum match score (percentage) at or above which a translation is accepted.

fillTarget.title: Fill target with leveraged translation
fillTarget.description: Fill the target with the leveraged translation when a match is found.

fillTargetThreshold.title: Fill target threshold
fillTargetThreshold.description: Minimum match score required to fill the target.

fillIfTargetIsEmpty.title: Fill only if target is empty
fillIfTargetIsEmpty.description: Only fill with leveraged translation if the target is currently empty.

fillIfTargetIsSameAsSource.title: Fill if target is same as source
fillIfTargetIsSameAsSource.description: Fill with leveraged translation if target text is identical to source.

downgradeIdenticalBestMatches.title: Downgrade identical best matches
downgradeIdenticalBestMatches.description: Downgrade score when translation is identical to source.

makeTMX.title: Generate TMX document
makeTMX.description: Create a TMX document with all matched entries.

tmxPath.title: TMX output path
tmxPath.description: Path for the generated TMX document.

useMTPrefix.title: Add MT prefix to source
useMTPrefix.description: Add an MT-specific prefix to ensure the entry is used as fuzzy match only.

useTargetPrefix.title: Add prefix to target
useTargetPrefix.description: Add a prefix to the leveraged target translation.

targetPrefix.title: Target prefix text
targetPrefix.description: The prefix string to add to the leveraged translation.

targetPrefixThreshold.title: Target prefix threshold
targetPrefixThreshold.description: Maximum match score below which the target prefix is added.

copySourceOnNoText.title: Copy source when no text
copySourceOnNoText.description: Copy source into target when there is no translatable text to leverage.
